use_cases: Animated hero section backgrounds with flowing procedural noise patterns
Landing page visual effects with customizable gradient colors
Abstract decorative elements for modern web interfaces
Ambient background animations for loading screens or transitions
Dynamic visual accents for marketing and promotional content
ai_summary: A WebGL shader component that renders animated simplex noise-based procedural graphics with customizable front/back colors, shape types, and pixel sizes. Uses real-time uniform updates for smooth animation effects. Perfect for creating modern abstract backgrounds and hero sections with flowing, organic visual patterns.
